title: taraxacum zhukovae
intro: Taraxacum zhukovae, also known as the Zhukovsky dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum zhukovae are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum zhukovae include its ability to support liver function, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum zhukovae is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed raw in salads or as a cooked vegetable.
